Your yard. Your climate.
Your Greenprint.

Greenprints are the easy button for converting any American yard to climate-resilient, water-smart, pollinator-friendly native plants.

Shaped and directed by human intelligence and expertise in ecology and science, powered by Claude AI.

A note on AI's footprint: a single Greenprint uses roughly the energy and water of a couple Google searches — small on its own. That's a real, valid concern at data-center scale, and we take it seriously.

40M+ acres of US lawns and yards
60–80% water reduction possible
50 states native plant coverage

See the transformation

Landscapes reimagined with plants native to your area. Increased drought resilience, and habitat and ecosystem services for bees, insects, birds, animals and soils … and less need for chemicals, irrigation and maintenance.

Step 1 of 3
Tell us about
your outdoor space
Enter your zip code. SmartScape's human expertise guides and shapes the AI-powered analysis of your site to build a personalized, native plant list — spanning groundcover to canopy — and a planting and maintenance timeline for the recommended nativescaping. Your Greenprint will include a list of native plant nurseries in your area, along with some that are national mail-order suppliers. Humans have assembled and are maintaining much of the data for Greenprints.

This is the Greenprint demo

Greenprint is one tool in SmartScape, a full native landscaping platform. Future Greenprint enhancements will add:

Google Satellite view integration — will map your actual yard geometry for a precise planting layout
Real-time nursery inventory — see exactly which plants are in stock near you today
Downloadable PDF Greenprint — your full plan in a beautiful, shareable document
Research university & USDA live data — plans continuously updated with latest climate-adaptive plant research
Seasonal maintenance subscription — quarterly guidance to keep your Climate Retrofit thriving
SmartScape's native plant recommendations are shaped and directed by real native-plant expertise, powered by Claude AI — trained on the USDA PLANTS Database, iNaturalist, university extension research, and peer-reviewed botanical literature. Recommendations are for informational purposes only. Your local nursery can confirm availability and answer any site-specific questions. Nursery data compiled from PlantNative.org, Calscape, Pollinator Pathway NW, Native Plants Hawaii, and regional conservation districts. All nurseries listed specialize in or carry native plants for their region. A note on AI's footprint: a single Greenprint uses roughly the energy and water of a couple Google searches — small on its own. AI's aggregate water and energy use at data-center scale is a real, valid concern. Every yard a Greenprint helps convert to natives can cut water use 60-80%, reduce pesticide/fertilizer runoff, and create pollinator habitat. SmartScape prototype — May 2026.
SmartScape · Greenprints · Shaped and directed by SmartScape's human intelligence and expertise, powered by Claude AI
A demo by Cathryn Poff · Wilsonville, Oregon
